Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Let us start.

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: QUESTIONER: What is on your left?
ANSWER: Nail polish is on my left.
QUESTIONER: What is there?
ANSWER: The trumpet is there.
QUESTIONER: What is inside?
ANSWER: The whale is inside.
QUESTIONER: What is at the bottom?
ANSWER: The sunflower is at the bottom.
QUESTIONER: What is nowhere?
ANSWER: The ukulele is nowhere.
QUESTIONER: What is here?
ANSWER: The lily is here.
QUESTIONER: What is on your right?
ANSWER: The bowl is on your right.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southeast?
ANSWER: The sparrow is in the southeast.
QUESTIONER: What is at the top?
ANSWER: Pens are at the top.
QUESTIONER: What is outside?
ANSWER: The tambourine is outside.
QUESTIONER: What is at the center?
ANSWER: The blouse is at the center.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northeast?
ANSWER: Pants are in the northeast.
QUESTIONER: What is in the northwest?
ANSWER: The carnation is in the northwest.
QUESTIONER: What is in the southwest?
ANSWER: Blush is in the southwest.
QUESTIONER: What is everywhere?
ANSWER: The eagle is everywhere.
ME:  Does the questioner know what is in the northwest? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

Things are in different places, but the questioner does not know about it yet. Here is the situation:

WHAT: Things at places
LEFT: nail polish
RIGHT: bowl
TOP: pens
BOTTOM: sunflower
CENTER: blouse
NORTHWEST: carnation
NORTHEAST: pants
SOUTHWEST: blush
SOUTHEAST: sparrow
HERE: lily
THERE: trumpet
NOWHERE: ukulele
EVERYWHERE: eagle
INSIDE: whale
OUTSIDE: tambourine

Questions from the questioner will start with QUESTIONER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
